metadata.title: Columns
metadata.description: Allows you to create columns in Obsidian Markdown

regex.source: desc:"Columns will have this minimum width before wrapping to a new row. 0 disables column wrapping. Useful for smaller devices"
regex.target: desc:"列在换行前将保持此最小宽度。设置为 0 可禁用列换行功能。对小屏设备非常实用"

regex.source: name:"The default span of an item"
desc:"The default width of a column. If the minimum width is specified, the width of the column will be multiplied by this setting."
regex.target: desc:"列的默认宽度。如果指定了最小宽度，列的宽度将根据此设置进行乘算。"
